items.title: Book exercises
items.text: Complete p. 137 exercises 4b and 5 in writing

features.title: Our Advantages
features.subtitle: Built by students who know what students actually need.

items.title: Completely Free
items.description: No premium tier, no credit card required. Every feature is available to every user, forever.

items.title: Zero Ads
items.description: Your study time is precious. We don't sell attention – no banners, no trackers, no distractions.

items.title: Privacy-First
items.description: Your data is yours. We don't sell it, share it, or use it for profiling. Sensitive data is encrypted with AES-256.

items.title: Collaborative
items.description: Join classes and groups. Share homework entries, compare schedules, and stay in sync with your classmates.

items.title: Homework Tracking
items.description: Log every assignment with subject, due date, and notes. Check off completed tasks and never miss a deadline.

items.title: Schedule Management
items.description: Your personal and group timetables in one view. Always know what's coming next.

disclaimer.title: Notice
disclaimer.text: This is a protected and private application. Any unauthorized attempt to circumvent security measures or to obtain sensitive data will be documented without exception and reported to law enforcement.

footer.byStudentsForStudents: This is a private project by students for students

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.text: We use cookies to reliably provide core functions such as login, security, and the operation of the schul-dashboard.

about.title: About Us
about.description: We are students building the school management tool we always wished existed.

hero.heading: Built by students, for students.
hero.subheading: schul-dashboard was born out of frustration with paper planners, scattered group chats, and overpriced school apps.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.text: We believe every student deserves access to great organisational tools – regardless of where they study or what they can afford. That's why schul-dashboard is free, ad-free, and always will be.

story.title: Our Story
story.text: schul-dashboard started as a personal side project to replace a paper homework planner. Over time it grew into a full collaborative platform, gaining traction among classmates and then beyond. Today it helps students across multiple schools manage their school lives.

items.title: Free Forever
items.description: No business model that requires users to pay. We build this for the community.

items.title: Open & Honest
items.description: We are transparent about what data we collect and why. No dark patterns.

items.title: Student-Centric
items.description: Every feature request, every design decision is evaluated through one lens: does this help students?

imprint.title: Imprint
imprint.description: Legal disclosure as required by § 5 TMG.

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
disclaimer.text: The contents of this website have been created with the utmost care. However, we cannot guarantee the accuracy, completeness, or timeliness of the content. As a service provider, we are responsible for our own content on these pages in accordance with § 7 Abs.1 TMG under general law.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.description: Information on how we handle your personal data in accordance with the GDPR.

intro.title: Introduction
intro.text: We take the protection of your personal data very seriously. This privacy policy explains what data we collect, how we use it, and what rights you have.

controller.title: Data Controller
controller.text: The data controller responsible for processing your personal data on this website is the operator of schul-dashboard. You can find the contact details in the Imprint.

dataCollected.title: Data We Collect
items: Account data: email address and password (stored encrypted)
Usage data: schedule entries, tasks, and group information you create
Technical data: IP address and browser information for security purposes (session management, CSRF protection)

purpose.title: Purpose of Processing
purpose.text: We process your data solely to provide the schul-dashboard service – managing homework, timetables, and school organisation. We do not sell, share, or use your data for advertising.

retention.title: Data Retention
retention.text: Your data is retained for as long as your account is active. You may request deletion of your account and all associated data at any time via the account settings.

rights.title: Your Rights
rights.intro: Under the GDPR you have the right to:
items: Access the personal data we hold about you
Erasure of your data ("right to be forgotten")
rights.contact: To exercise these rights, please contact us via the details in the Imprint.

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.text: We use only technically necessary cookies for authentication (session token) and security (CSRF token). No tracking or advertising cookies are used.

security.title: Security
security.text: All data is transmitted over encrypted HTTPS connections. Passwords are stored using industry-standard hashing (bcrypt). Sensitive data is encrypted with AES-256-GCM.

changes.title: Changes to this Policy
changes.text: We may update this privacy policy from time to time. We will notify users of significant changes by posting a notice in the application.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.description: Rules and conditions for using schul-dashboard.

acceptance.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.text: By creating an account and using schul-dashboard, you agree to these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, please do not use the service.

service.title: 2. Description of Service
service.text: schul-dashboard is a free, collaborative school management tool for students. It provides features including homework tracking, timetable management, and group collaboration.

account.title: 3. User Accounts
items: You must provide a valid email address to register.
You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials.
You must not share your account with others.
You must be of school age or have parental consent to use this service.

conduct.title: 4. Acceptable Use
items: Attempt to gain unauthorized access to the system or other users' data
Upload malicious content or attempt to disrupt the service
Use the service for any illegal purpose

termination.title: 5. Account Termination
termination.text: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms. You may delete your account at any time via the account settings.

liability.title: 6. Limitation of Liability
liability.text: schul-dashboard is provided "as is" without any warranty. We are not liable for any loss of data or interruption of service. As a free, non-commercial project, we provide this service on a best-effort basis.

changes.title: 7. Changes to Terms
changes.text: We may update these terms from time to time. Continued use of the service after changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.

governing.title: 8. Governing Law
governing.text: These terms are governed by the laws of the Federal Republic of Germany.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Have questions or feedback? We'd love to hear from you.

getInTouch.title: Get in Touch
getInTouch.text: schul-dashboard is a student project built with care. If you have questions, feedback, or need to report an issue, please reach out.

github.title: GitHub
github.text: Found a bug or have a feature request? Open an issue on GitHub.

response.title: Response Time
response.text: We aim to respond within a few days. As a student project maintained in our spare time, please be patient.
